title: YFs - 3D Hand Torch and Lanterns
description: My texture pack adds freshness to the game because there are so few 3D things in Minecraft.
body:
###                               **_Hello people!_**
![Torch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/451b6a186f037fd7ec89a539792afe6de7f5f596.png)

Texture pack adds 3D torch and lantern.

![Torch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b791db31db5e6d3eb6e4ce638807a9a175a75e1.png)



that's all)


![)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dcc7acf72123a5ddbedd7c5d7acda810cebc7f31.png)


Good game!
